note: Purchased — an optional challenge leaf, so its pool is not its prereq closure: the player comes back to it after progressing further, and Forge and Trader are both fair game. The goal wants 50🪙 + 40🔨 + culture level 2 held at once inside the Pharaoh's deadline, so the deck runs three engines in parallel — Trader/Jewelry for money, Forge for production, Cave Art/Beer/Göbekli for culture — with Houses and Conquest widening the worker base that feeds all three. The Pyramid wonder itself is this mission's reward, so Göbekli is the deck's one wonder.
